zh.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesley是Sir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHT的女兒，於1321年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯。她於1348年之前與Michael de Poynings結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年5月11日在英國素可波尼斯享年48歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesley是Sir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHT的女儿，于1321年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯。她于1348年之前与Michael de Poynings结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年5月11日在英国素可波尼斯享年48岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesley was born in 1321, in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England as the daughter of Sir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHT. She married Michael de Poynings before 1348. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 11 May 1369, in Poynings, Sussex, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesley est née en 1321, à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de Sir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHT. Elle a épousé Michael de Poynings avant 1348. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 mai 1369, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesley wurde 1321 in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, als Tochter von Sir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHT geboren. Sie hat vor 1348 Michael de Poynings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Mai 1369 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Poynings, Sussex, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesley è nata il nel 1321 nel Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England come figlia di Sir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHT. Lei sposato Michael de Poynings prima del 1348. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 maggio 1369, nel Poynings, Sussex, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.Slaugham, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックススラウアム
ja.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesleyは1321年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズでSir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHTの娘として生まれた。1348年以前にMichael de Poyningsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年5月11日にイギリススセックスポイニングズで48歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesley(은)는 1321년 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에서 Sir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHT의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1348년 이전 Michael de Poynings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 5월 11일 영국 수세스 포이닝스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Of, Sefton, Lancashire, England: Sefton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesley nasceu em 1321, em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de Sir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHT. Ela casou-se com Michael de Poynings antes 1348. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de maio de 1369, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesley родилась в 1321 г. в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия. Её отца звали Sir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHT. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Michael de Poynings перед 1348 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 мая 1369 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Joane de Rokesley nació en 1321, en Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra como hija de Sir Richard de Rokesley KNIGHT. Se casó con Michael de Poynings antes de 1348. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1369, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
